videos.headline: Cooper Mathers makes catch for 9-yard receiving touchdown
videos.description: Cooper Mathers makes catch for 9-yard receiving touchdown

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cooper Mathers makes catch for 9-yard receiving touchdown) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Carlos Hernandez breaks loose for 32-yard Washington State TD
videos.description: John Mateer passes to Carlos Hernandez for a 32-yard touchdown, Washington State's first score against Hawai'i.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Carlos Hernandez breaks loose for 32-yard Washington State TD) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tylan Hines hauls in a Hawai'i TD
videos.description: Brayden Schager connects with Tylan Hines for a 17-yard touchdown, cutting into Washington State's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tylan Hines hauls in a Hawai'i TD) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Brayden Schager loses fumble after getting clobbered
videos.description: Brayden Schager is sacked for a loss, leading to a forced fumble recovered by Washington State's Bryson Lamb.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Brayden Schager loses fumble after getting clobbered) 2024/10/19 ESHEET

videos.headline: Leo Pulalasi dives for final WSU TD
videos.description: Leo Pulalasi extends the lead with a diving touchdown for Washington State, sealing the 42-10 victory vs. Hawai'i.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Leo Pulalasi dives for final WSU TD) 2024/10/19 ESHEET
